content.full_text:
October 5, 2005

Charles Ulmschneider
P O Box 523
Visalia, CA
Fax 559-733-4317

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. 08-181

Dear Mr. Ulmschneider:

This letter is a follow up to my voice mail messages left on October 28 and 29, 2008. You requested advice regarding the campaign rules under the Political Reform Act (the "Act"). You requested a response regarding actions you were taking on or about October 27, 2008, the day we received your advice request.

As I noted in the messages, the legal division takes approximately 21 working days to provide written advice. I referred you to our technical assistance division's telephone advice line for a more immediate response to your question.

With this letter, we are withdrawing the request. If you wish to renew it with a new prospective advice request, please feel free to contact us at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

John W. Wallace
Assistant General Counsel
Legal Division
